alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defences Responding to Iranian Attacks
alerts.description: UAE air defences are currently responding to incoming missile and drone threats from Iran. Sounds heard across various areas are from air defence systems intercepting ballistic missiles and fighter aircraft intercepting drones.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defences Engage Iranian Attack
alerts.description: UAE air defences engaged Iranian ballistic missiles, cruise missiles and UAVs. Daily statistics show 0 ballistic missiles and 9 UAVs detected. Cumulative totals since Iranian aggression: 357 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, 1815 UAVs.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defences Engaged 9 Iranian UAVs
alerts.description: UAE air defence systems successfully engaged 9 UAVs launched from Iran on March 25, 2026. All drones were intercepted with no reported impacts.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defense Intercepts 9 Iranian Drones
alerts.description: UAE air defenses successfully intercepted 9 drones coming from Iran on March 25, 2026. Since the Iranian attacks began, UAE has dealt with 357 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, and 1815 drones total. The attacks resulted in 3 military casualties and 6 civilian deaths, with 166 injured.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Contractor Killed in Iranian Missile Attack in Bahrain
alerts.description: Moroccan national contractor martyred and five UAE Ministry of Defence members injured in Iranian missile attack during routine mission in Bahrain

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: Iranian Missile Attack on Bahrain - UAE Personnel Casualties
alerts.description: Iranian missile attack on Kingdom of Bahrain resulted in death of one Moroccan civilian contractor with UAE Armed Forces and injury of five UAE Ministry of Defense personnel during routine mission
